---
title: "Papers"
listing:
  - id: pub-full-list
    contents: data/publications.yml
    template: _templates/pub-list.ejs.md
---

\* denotes equal contribution • α-β denotes alphabetical order

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=F-ytPfAAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate) may have a more updated list.

:::{#pub-full-list}
:::
